reasoning.evidence: No mention of Nablarchバッチ, BatchAction, DataReader, or batch-related concepts. Content is exclusively about REST testing.
No mention of Jakarta Batch, JSR 352, Batchlet, Chunk, or javax.batch. Content is exclusively about REST testing.

Content explicitly targets 'RESTfulウェブサービス実行基盤' multiple times. Uses RestTestSupport, SimpleRestTestSupport, RestMockHttpRequest classes from nablarch.test.core.http. Test examples show GET/PUT requests to REST endpoints with JSON response validation.
No mention of HTTPメッセージング, HTTP受信, メッセージ同期応答, or HttpMessagingRequestParsingHandler. REST testing is distinct from HTTP messaging.

No mention of Webアプリケーション, JSP, HttpRequest (web app context), or セッション管理 as a web application pattern. Session handling (NablarchSIDManager, NABLARCH_SID) is mentioned only in the context of REST testing cookie inheritance, not web application architecture.
No mention of MOMメッセージング, MQ, キュー, 非同期メッセージ, or MomMessagingAction.
No mention of DB連携メッセージング, テーブルキュー, 電文, or DatabaseRecordReader.
